scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-[1.05]

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Add a fixed full-screen SVG noise overlay with pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-multiply to create an editorial, premium organic feel.

layouts.spacing_scale: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, py-32 for section separation
layouts.services_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Poultry (col-span-full lg:col-span-8), Animal Feed (col-span-full lg:col-span-4), etc. Create asymmetry.
layouts.about_stats: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 gap-y-12 items-start

Header.layout: Fixed top-4 left-4 right-4 z-50 mx-auto max-w-7xl rounded-full px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center transition-all duration-300
Header.style: Use Glassmorphism visual enhancer. Do not use pure transparent background.
Header.elements: Logo (font-bold text-xl text-brand_primary), Nav Links (hidden on mobile, gap-8 on desktop), FR/EN Toggle (text-sm font-bold cursor-pointer hover:text-brand_primary_light), Get Started CTA (Pill shape, brand_primary bg, white text)

Hero.layout: min-h-[95vh] flex flex-col justify-end pb-24 px-8 relative overflow-hidden rounded-b-[4rem] mx-4 mt-4
Hero.style: Full cover background image. Image overlay: bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1F2937] via-[#1F2937]/50 to-transparent.
Hero.elements: Massive H1 'Transforming Agriculture. Empowering Africa.' (text-white max-w-4xl), Subtitle (text-white/80 max-w-2xl mt-6), Primary CTA (Gold bg, Dark text, mt-10), Trust badges row below CTA.

Services.style: Bento Grid Layout. Cards should have surface_white background, border_light, and overflow hidden group relative.
Services.elements: 5 Cards: Poultry, Animal Feed, Agriculture, Aquaculture, Livestock. Each card has an image (h-48 or absolute fill with overlay depending on bento block size), Title, short desc, and a subtle animated arrow icon on hover.

About.layout: py-24 px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center
About.elements: Left col: Large H2, thick green divider (w-24 h-2 bg-brand_primary mt-8), compelling paragraph. Right col: 4-stat grid (10,000+ Farmers, 50+ Products, 15+ Countries, 100% Sustainable) using brand_secondary for numbers.

Contact.layout: py-24 bg-surface_white rounded-[4rem] px-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto my-24 shadow-sm border border-border_light relative overflow-hidden
Contact.elements: Clean functional form (Name, Email, Message, Submit). Inputs should be minimalistic: subtle rounded-xl bg-background_light px-6 py-4 border-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand_primary/20.

Footer.layout: bg-brand_primary text-white py-24 px-8 rounded-t-[4rem] mt-24
Footer.elements: Massive 'EFASOL' typography (opacity-10 text-[15vw] absolute bottom-0 left-0 pointer-events-none), grid for links, gold accent text for email/phone, social icons.

Floating_WhatsApp.style: rounded-full bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center animate-bounce-slow

motion.scrolling: Implement Lenis smooth scroll for a premium, heavy momentum feel.
motion.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for Hero text. Hero image slow scale-out (from scale 1.1 to 1.0 over 10 seconds).
motion.scroll_reveal: Use Framer Motion 'whileInView' for sections to fade up (y: 40 -> 0) and bento cards to stagger in.
motion.interactions: Buttons: scale down 0.95 on tap. Cards: subtle -translate-y-2 on hover with shadow expansion.

hero_background.description: Tractor driving through field at sunset

service_livestock.description: Brown and white cow on green grass

service_aquaculture.description: Aerial view of sustainable fish farm nets

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses proper gradient overlays to meet contrast ratios. Never place light text directly on raw images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='lang-toggle', data-testid='contact-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the landing page in React 19 + Tailwind v4 using standard .js/.jsx extensions.
Implement a dummy i18n React state to toggle content between FR and EN (keep it simple, inline dictionary is fine).
CRITICAL: The Header must use the glassmorphism utility classes and never be purely transparent. Ensure it floats smoothly over the Hero.
Add a global SVG noise overlay as a fixed, pointer-events-none layer to create the 'editorial/premium' texture requested.
Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Manrope' via standard CSS @import in index.css as specified in the typography imports array. DO NOT use generic fonts.
For the Services section, explicitly use the asymmetrical Bento grid provided (mixing col-span-12, 8, 4 etc.). Add `overflow-hidden` to cards so inner images can scale up on hover.
The Contact form must be fully functional UI-wise with proper inputs and button states.
Ensure the hero image has a solid bottom gradient overlay to make text highly readable.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals and staggered text entrances.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not make generic centered layouts. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Create depth through layered design elements (z-index hierarchy). Use modern pill-shaped buttons. Exclude transforms from universal transition rules (`transition-all` is fine if no complex transforms are applied, otherwise specify `transition-colors`, etc.). Every interaction needs micro-animations. ALWAYS add `data-testid` to everything interactive.
